notes: Updated: - Installer now allows custom install location but is greyed out by default and has warning - Image viewer particle effects options improved and zerodivide crash fixed (only affected bubbles) - Fixed and unhid Autoplay on startup option available in Settings > General (autoplays at startup by default, but allows users to prevent autoplay at startup if they wish) - playback modes overhauled:    - added shuffle tracks + album (dice icon) for 5 shuffle modes total, added repeat all for 4 repeat modes total - repeat modes take precedence and modifies shuffle behaviour - shuffle mode tooltips will change according to repeat mode    - super shuffle + repeat off indexing now works properly - no repeats and stops at ends of queue    - shuffle album + repeat off and shuffle tracks + album + repeat off also use indexing to avoid repeats and stop at end of queue.
